---
title: "Assignments"
date: last-modified
---

- [Week 1: Data Tidying](assignments/week1_tidyData.html) (due 1/21 at 8am) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/week1_tidyData.qmd)
- [Week 2: Workflowr Project Setup](assignments/week2_workflowr_setup.html) (due 2/4 at 8am) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/week2_workflowr_setup.qmd)
- [Week 3: Data Wrangling](assignments/week3_dataWrangling.html) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/week3_dataWrangling.qmd) — [Download data](assignments/files/national-month.csv.gz)
- [Week 9/10: Graphical Idioms in ggplot2](assignments/week9_10_ggplot_idioms.html) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/week9_10_ggplot_idioms.qmd)
- [Data quality assurance and processing project proposal](assignments/data_quality_assurance_processing_project_proposal_2026.html) (due 1/29/2026)
- [Data quality assurance and processing project assignment](assignments/data_quality_assurance_processing_project_assignment_2026.html) (due 2/12/2026)
- [Conceptual figure/infographic project assignment](assignments/conceptual_figure_infographic_project_assignment_2026.html) (draft critique: 2/26/2026; final due 3/5/2026)
- [Conceptual figure peer critique guide](assignments/conceptual_figure_peer_critique_guide_2026.html) (in-class: 2/26/2026) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/conceptual_figure_peer_critique_guide_2026.qmd)
- [Final project proposal](assignments/final_project_proposal_2026.html) (due 3/26/2026) — [Download QMD](assignments/downloads/final_project_proposal_2026.qmd)
